title: wedelia oligocephala
intro: Wedelia oligocephala, also known as the butterfly weed or yellow daisy, is a flowering plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Wedelia oligocephala include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Wedelia oligocephala can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
